title: Luxuriant Russian Tofu Dumplings
description: A plant-based take on traditional Russian dumplings, featuring crispy deep-fried tofu and a rich double cream sauce, served on a slate tile vessel.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, thyme, salt, and pepper to make the dumpling coating.
Toss the tofu cubes in the flour mixture to coat evenly.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Deep fry the coated tofu cubes in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried tofu from the oil and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a medium saucepan, combine the double cream, chopped onion, and minced garlic, and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and let the cream sauce simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it thickens slightly.
To assemble the dumplings, place a few pieces of the fried tofu on a slate tile vessel, then spoon some of the cream sauce over the top.
Serve the Luxuriant Russian Tofu Dumplings immediately, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
